name: Christmas Bisquits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar thoroughly.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the sour cream and add to the mixture.
4. Sift flour into the dough until it is stiff enough to handle.
5. Chill overnight.
6. In the morning, roll out thinly on a floured board and cut with a cookie cutter.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
